hooks.command: echo 'PRESERVE: Design Forge plugin is active. Components at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/components/: canvas system (GenerativeCanvas + useCanvas + presets), glassmorphism (GlassPanel), custom cursor (CustomCursor), scroll effects (ScrollProgress + useNavbarCompact), hover cards (HoverCardCanvas), sound (useSoundLayer), effects (Scanlines, Typewriter), scenes (HeroScene). References at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/design-forge/references/: canvas-system, design-patterns, animation-recipes, 3d-integration, micro-interactions, accessibility, nextjs-conf-patterns, gsap-framework-patterns, gsap-plugins, gsap-scrolltrigger-advanced.'
